templates.name: product-detail
templates.description: Product/platform pages: hero, slalom feature sections, accordion+codepanel, quotecase, card grids, FAQ, endcap. Source is Emotion CSS-in-JS (hashed css-* classes); stable hooks are .code-panel-container and [id^='accordion-tab-']; slalom/hero/cards/quotecase/endcap are heading-anchored with structural self-filtering in the parsers.

templates.name: blog-article
templates.description: Blog article: back-link header + H1 + date, language/CTA aside callouts, long-form rich-text body (default content), article sidebar rail (share + author + resources). Stable hooks: .aside-container for callouts, <aside>/[role=complementary] for the rail.

templates.name: webinar
templates.description: On-demand webinar: eyebrow + H1, video player (poster), description/topics/speakers body (default content), date+share sidebar rail, and a 'More like this' related-cards grid. Stable hooks: .media-container (video), <aside> (rail), <section> siblings after 'More like this' (cards). Note: hydrated DOM has poster + JS player only (no static video URL).

templates.name: resource-article
templates.description: Resource/basics article: hero (H1 + CTAs), long-form rich-text body (default content) with inline codepanel/table/embed, FAQ accordion, related-resources sidebar, end CTA. Stable hooks shared with product pages: .code-panel-container (codepanel), [id^='accordion-tab-'] (accordion); plus table.border-collapse, iframe[src*='charts.mongodb.com'].

templates.name: contact
templates.description: Contact page: H1 + 3-tab contact-type selector (Sales/Product&Billing/Company), chat-intro panel (default content), Marketo inquiry form (flagged for Forms workflow, captured as default content), FAQ accordion. Stable hooks: [id^='tab-'] tab buttons, .exp-faq-wrapper FAQ items (NOT the product-page accordion hook). The 'Ask MongoDB Assistant' chatbot is page chrome (out of scope).

sections.description: Dark hero: 'Contact Us' H1 + 3-tab contact-type selector + per-tab chat panel and inquiry form (gray-800/gray-1000 background).
Light FAQ section: 'Frequently asked questions' heading + 5 expandable Q/A pairs.
